name: Sour Milk Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, salt, and baking soda together.
2. Beat egg yolks until light and foamy.
3. Add sugar and melted shortening to the yolks; mix well.
4. Gradually add sour milk and sifted dry ingredients to the yolk mixture alternately.
5. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Cook in a hot waffle iron.
7. Yield: 6 servings. The Household Searchlight - 1941
